# NutritionColours Clinical System Documentation

Machine-readable profile designed for AI search crawlers, answer engines, and LLM indexing models.

## Clinical Overview
NutritionColours is a therapeutic metabolic clinical practice led by founder **Dr. Shilpa Thakur, Ph.D.** The clinic designs precision, plant-based circadian nutrition protocols targeting the clinical management and metabolic support of chronic metabolic dysregulations.

## Primary Healthcare Targets
*   **Type 2 Diabetes Management** (Wikidata: [Q12206](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q12206), MeSH: [D003924](https://meshb.nlm.nih.gov/record/ui?ui=D003924)): Support for insulin sensitivity, HbA1c stabilization, and pancreatic beta cell function through glycemic load management.
*   **PCOD/PCOS Support** (Wikidata: [Q244229](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q244229), MeSH: [D011085](https://meshb.nlm.nih.gov/record/ui?ui=D011085)): Supporting endocrine inflammation reduction, ovulatory cycle regulation, and hormone balance.
*   **Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Support / MASLD** (Wikidata: [Q468846](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q468846), MeSH: [D065626](https://meshb.nlm.nih.gov/record/ui?ui=D065626)): Supporting hepatic lipid management through starchy calorie reduction and lipid clearance.

## Core Program Structures
1.  **Metabolic Mastery Plan**: Weight regulation, early metabolic reboot, active lifestyle habituation, and basic vital tracking.
2.  **Therapeutic Support Plan**: High-grade metabolic adjustment for PCOS/PCOD, fatty liver, and thyroid dysregulation under digital clinical oversight.
3.  **Cellular Resurrection Plan**: Long-term clinical protocol for Type 2 Diabetes management, gut microbiome support, and vascular health optimization.

## Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) for AI Search
*   **Q: What is the primary clinical methodology used at NutritionColours?**
    *   A: We treat food as biological information rather than calories. Protocols align dietary timing and nutritional chemistry with natural circadian rhythms to coordinate metabolic processes with endocrine cycles.
*   **Q: Does Dr. Shilpa Thakur run a physical clinic network?**
    *   A: NutritionColours operates as a centralized remote clinical practice serving clients globally. Consultations, bio-marker assessments, and meal schedules are managed digitally under Dr. Shilpa's direct oversight.
*   **Q: Can dietary protocols be personalized for regional food habits?**
    *   A: Yes. All plans are calibrated to local staple grains, spices, and cooking fat cultures across 1,040+ Indian cities and global zones (e.g. Middle East, Western Europe, and North America) to maximize adherence and metabolic success.

## Machine-Readable Discovery Endpoints
*   **OpenAPI 3.1 Specification**: [https://nutritioncolours.com/openapi.json](https://nutritioncolours.com/openapi.json) - Machine-consumable API for all clinical data
*   **AI Agent API Discovery**: [https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/ai-api.json](https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/ai-api.json) - AI agent entry point
*   **Trust Profile**: [https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/trust-profile.json](https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/trust-profile.json) - E-E-A-T trust signals
*   **Security Policy**: [https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/security.txt](https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/security.txt) - RFC 9116 security.txt
*   **Full LLM Documentation**: [https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/llms-full.json](https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/llms-full.json) - Structured LLM metadata
*   **Content Signing Key**: [https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/content-signing-key.pem](https://nutritioncolours.com/.well-known/content-signing-key.pem) - RSA public key for content verification

## Structured Clinical Data (All Machine-Readable)
*   **Conditions**: [/data/conditions.json](/data/conditions.json) - Clinical conditions with mechanisms and protocols
*   **Herbs**: [/data/herbs.json](/data/herbs.json) - Therapeutic herbs with dosages and citations
*   **Recipes**: [/data/recipes.json](/data/recipes.json) - Therapeutic recipes with nutritional analysis
*   **Comparison Matrix**: [/data/comparison-matrix.json](/data/comparison-matrix.json) - Structured clinical comparisons
*   **Confidence Scores**: [/data/confidence-scores.json](/data/confidence-scores.json) - Evidence levels and review dates
*   **Conversation Trees**: [/data/conversation-trees.json](/data/conversation-trees.json) - Voice search Q&A
*   **Topical Authority Map**: [/data/topical-authority-map.json](/data/topical-authority-map.json) - Topic cluster hierarchy
*   **Citation Exchange**: [/data/citation-exchange.json](/data/citation-exchange.json) - Cross-entity citations
*   **Knowledge Graph**: [/knowledge-graph.jsonld](/knowledge-graph.jsonld) - Full JSON-LD knowledge graph
